title: The Gateway to the Horn
description: Navigating the Blue Conflict Zone and the Area Barrier.

steps.title: Step Into the Blue
steps.instruction: Move your Warrior into the blue Conflict Zone.
steps.explanation: Entering the Conflict Zone changes the game from quiet movement into direct combat pressure.
steps.hint: Advance your Warrior into the blue zone.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Move to the highlighted blue square inside the Conflict Zone.
steps.strategic_context: The center is where pressure builds. Once you enter it, every move becomes tactical.

steps.title: Check the Color Code
steps.instruction: Select the Warrior standing on the colored triangle.
steps.explanation: Inside the Conflict Zone, you must always notice the triangle type first. Combat is color-coded by area type.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Select the Warrior on the colored triangle to continue.

steps.title: Strike the Same
steps.instruction: Capture the enemy piece that shares your area type.
steps.explanation: Captures only work when both pieces are in the same area type. The gray shadow shows a piece that is in range but protected by the Area Barrier.
steps.hint: Take the red capture, not the gray shadow.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Only the capture target inside the same area type is legal.

steps.title: The King's Exception
steps.instruction: Move your King across the barrier.
steps.explanation: The King is the exception. It can cross the barrier when other pieces are trapped by it.
steps.hint: Let the King cross where the Warrior cannot.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Move the King to the highlighted square across the barrier.

steps.title: Count to Ten
steps.instruction: Every successful strike brings you closer to victory. Capture another piece.
steps.explanation: Each capture advances your count toward ten. When you reach ten captures, the game is yours.
steps.hint: Capture the highlighted enemy to increase your tally.
steps.mistakeFeedback: Look for the legal capture that advances your total.
